论人到底有多莫名其妙？
这是个好问题。
……
说不好，不好说，不说好。
所以………………别说。
既然别说，那就看看吧。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o962ce46bf59a6326ba512b0a6fd93a48~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"辛式霸总","author_id":"","book_id":"7498386069541358616","book_name":"论人到底有多莫名其妙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d89080","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7498386133831647768","read_count":"2","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"157961"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"78","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o962ce46bf59a6326ba512b0a6fd93a48~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182992&x-signature=UDI63SKBWCR9qPBXrmUmaVhVGt4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1310216085836711","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201729525C8857B50D5373EBDEED"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":73},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7498386069541358616","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_domin
